title: Next.js 16 Frontend Starter
description: A production-ready foundation with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, i18n, theming, and opinionated architecture — so you can ship features, not boilerplate.

integrated.title: Integrated stack
integrated.subtitle: Everything wired up and ready to build on.

roadmap.title: Future releases
roadmap.subtitle: Planned additions for upcoming versions of this starter.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: OAuth and credential flows with protected routes and session handling.

testing.title: Testing suite
testing.description: Playwright end-to-end tests and Vitest unit tests with example coverage.

dashboard.title: Dashboard layouts
dashboard.description: Sidebar navigation, responsive shells, and example app pages.

forms.title: Form patterns
forms.description: React Hook Form + Zod examples for common input and validation flows.

api.title: API integration
api.description: Service layer examples with typed Axios clients and TanStack Query hooks.

cicd.title: CI/CD pipelines
cicd.description: GitHub Actions workflows for linting, type-checking, and deployment.
